title: AI Invoice Processing SaaS for Freelancers
description: Full pipeline run for a SaaS idea targeting freelancers

input.idea: AI-powered invoice processing that automatically extracts line items from PDF invoices and reconciles them with purchase orders
input.target_audience: freelancers doing $50K-200K/year with 10+ clients who spend 4+ hours/week on manual invoicing

cli_command: skillchain launch "AI invoice processing for freelancers" --audience "freelancers doing $50K-200K/year" --skills "python,ML,freelancing" --budget "$500/month" --type saas
